# Wolstein Putts Expert Consulting (WPEC)

## About

Wolstein Putts Expert Consulting is a full-service vocational expert firm with a focus on employment law and matrimonial matters. WPEC is an affiliate of Kincaid Wolstein Vocational and Rehabilitation Services and serves attorneys in the New York City area and nationwide.

## Services

- Vocational evaluations
- Transferable skills analyses
- Labor market research
- Earning potential assessments
- Mitigation effort opinions
- Expert witness testimony in deposition and trial
- Clinical and vocational rehabilitation counseling
- Career coaching and counseling

## Practice Focus

- Employment law (wrongful termination, discrimination, ADA accommodation)
- Matrimonial / family law (earning capacity, employability)

## Team

- Dan Wolstein, Ph.D., CRC, CLCP, IPEC, ABVE/D, LRC, FVE, CVE - President / Partner
- Matthew R. Putts, Ph.D., LPC, LRC, NCC, CRC, CLCP, IPEC, CVE - Chief Executive Officer / Partner
- Rona Wexler, M.A., ABVE/D

## Geographic Coverage

- Headquartered in the New York City area
- Serves attorneys nationwide, with particular focus on the Northeast (New York, Connecticut, New Jersey, Pennsylvania) and Florida
